channel.title: New local problems on FixMyStreet
channel.description: The latest local problems reported by users

item.title: Lime bikes, 1st March
item.description:
There are at least 10 lime bikes along Anchor & hope lane. 2 by the entrance to Sainsbury's warehouse.
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Anchor And Hope Lane, Charlton Riverside, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Corner of Pentland Road and Stafford Road, nearest the park, 1st March
item.description:
Please repair this damaged sign. It's been broken for ages. It looks awful and the appearance of neglect encourages crime.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stafford Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Rubbish and mattresses in front of gate., 1st March
item.description:
Several mattresses and other rubbish have been left there since 2024 and have not been removed. In addition, a car was abandoned at least six months ago and has remained unattended ever since. This situation is causing concern and negatively affecting the surrounding area. I would be grateful if you could arrange for an inspection and take the necessary action to resolve these issues. Thank you for your attention to this matter.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Southampton Way, Camberwell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tagging, 1st March
item.description:
Graffiti tagging under bridge

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Waterson Street, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Graffiti tagging, 1st March
item.description:
Graffiti tagging under bridge

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Kingsland Road, Hackney, London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fridge, household waste dumped, 1st March
item.description:
A fridge freezer and several bags of house hold waste including nappies have been dumped

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Parkside Road, Lower Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Car with no reg plates dumped outside Squires House / Spooner House, 1st March
item.description:
The area is rife with untaxed / SORN cars and here’s one with no license plates at all!

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Barnfield Gardens, Plumstead
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Several dumped items, 1st March
item.description:
Several fly-tipped items including several draws and other bulk

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Gladstone Mews, Anerley, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Regular obstructive parking, 1st March
item.description:
Vehicles especially a van, are frequently being parked very close to a driveway along this part of the road. As the area is near a bend and close to a school, visibility is already limited, and parking so close to the driveway makes it difficult for residents to turn in and out safely. With children and families using the area at busy times, this raises general safety concerns. This seems to be a recurring issue locally, and a review of parking practices here could help improve safety for everyone.

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Firs Lane, Southgate
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Lime bike dumped on pavement., 1st March
item.description:
Abandoned Lime bike causing a hazard.
Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Tiverton Drive, Eltham
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Damage to park play area, 1st March
item.description:
Three items are damaged. The large climbing pyramid has a broken rope. The main climbing area in the middle with the yellow slide has all broken ropes. And by the pirate ship, the yellow climbing sail thing has a broken ladder at the bottom. See photos. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Park, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Mattress Blocking Pavement, 1st March
item.description:
Someone has dumped a mattress on the pavement in Franklin Road
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Franklin Road, Upper Belvedere, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Road works sign left against safety barrier, 1st March
item.description:
Road works sign left against safety barrier outside 188 (approx) Widmore Road. It's been there for a couple of weeks now and causes something of an obstruction on the pedestrian footway

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Widmore Road, Widmore, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grafitti on bin, 1st March
item.description:
On the bin in the park on the pathway. See photo. Thanks

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Park, Welling, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Brick wall not safe, 1st March
item.description:
The brick wall around the property on the corner of Vicars Hill and Algiers Road, SE13 is crumbling and coming down. It is becoming a health and safety risk.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 13, Vicars Hill, Ladywell, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Grafitti, 1st March
item.description:
On the back of the bus stop (visibility from within the park). See photo.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): Danson Road, Blendon, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Abandoned bike, 1st March
item.description:
Bike left on pavement
Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 17, Tiverton Drive, New Eltham, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Half of Trellis fencing missing, 1st March
item.description:
Trellis fencing was erected early Jan.2024 by B&M McHugh ...0208 8859 7706. This was on the orders of Bromley Council. A 7 page illustrated package was sent to Bromley Council a few weeks ago, but no response yet....

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): St. Timothy's Mews, Plaistow, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Pothole, approx 20 inches in diameter, 1st March
item.description:
Damaged road outside 5 Copsewood Close. It’s not the deepest pothole - but it’s wide, and getting worse and spreading each winter - it’s equally an amenity issue as it is dangerous, as it looks awful. All houses on our road are band G and H homes - we pay a fortune in council tax (no doubt about to go up by yet another maximum 4.99%, and this damaged road has been like so for years now. Photo attached. Thanks.

Nearest road to the pin placed on the map (automatically generated by OpenStreetMap): 10, Copsewood Close, Falconwood, Sidcup, Greater London
Report on FixMyStreet

item.title: Fly tipping, 1st March
item.description:
115 Brighton Road residents always leave their rubbish on street everyday regardless of collection day

Nearest address to the pin placed on the map (from OS Places API): Stoke Newington Road, London
Report on FixMyStreet
